visual_summary: A reusable button component with various styles and effects, including hover, active, and loading states.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: neumorph-button-demo
Description: A reusable button component with various styles and effects, including hover, active, and loading states.
Style: neumorphic, glassmorphism
Interactions: animated, hover, clickable
Tags: button, neumorph, ui, components

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// registry/default/example/neumorph-button-demo.tsx
"use client"

import type React from "react"
import { useState } from "react"

import NeumorphButton from "../ui/neumorph-button"

export default function NeumorphButtonDemo() {
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)

  const handleClick = () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 2000)
  }

  return (
